headerDescription: I'm a frontend developer who loves crafting beautiful and performant web experiences. My journey in the world of web development has been nothing short of amazing.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Here are a few projects I've worked on recently. Want to see more? Email me.

resume.title: Resume-inline
resume.description: Initially, it is conceived as a personal project, with the aim of learning new technologies and improving my skills as a frontend developer. It is a web application that allows users to create their resume quickly and easily by interacting with a user-friendly interface.

chart.title: Chart Library
chart.description: Line chart library built with React. It is a simple and easy-to-use library that allows you to create beautiful and interactive line charts. It is designed to be flexible and customizable, so you can easily adapt it to your needs.

esphin.title: Esphin
esphin.description: Portfolio for my personal software consultancy project. We offer application development, custom solutions, and digital transformation for businesses.

about.title: About me
about.skillsDescription: Profound expertise in frontend technologies, complemented by a solid track record in developing high-performance web applications and crafting intuitive user interfaces. Boasts a specialization in deploying React for the engineering of robust pharmaceutical ERP systems, demonstrating a keen focus on optimizing workflow efficiency and data management.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for collaborations or just a friendly hello!
